message:
fix(patrol): pass rig-level merge_strategy to refinery formula (gt-31c)

Wire MergeStrategy through buildRefineryPatrolVars: inject merge_strategy
variable when explicitly set in rig config, omit when empty to let the
formula default ("direct") apply. Add merge_strategy to the fallback
label-based path. Add tests for both explicit and default-omit cases.

Contributor: quad341 (PR #3328)
